notes: Designer and firm credits are gathered in Round 2 and are not included in this initial narrative specification.

fields.label: Entry overview
fields.drafting_instructions: Explain what the entry is, its key features and functionality, and what makes it distinctive.

fields.label: Design innovation
fields.drafting_instructions: Explain how the entry is new, what critical problem it solves, and how the solution addresses it.

fields.label: Benefit to user
fields.drafting_instructions: Describe concrete end-user benefits and tasks or daily-life improvements enabled by the design.

fields.label: Benefit to client or brand
fields.drafting_instructions: Explain evidenced business or brand impact and design's role as a differentiator.

fields.label: Benefit to society
fields.drafting_instructions: Explain supported social, cultural, or environmental impact without inflating intended benefits into measured outcomes.

fields.label: Appropriate aesthetics
fields.drafting_instructions: Explain how form, color, materials, finishes, manufacturing, and use are related.

fields.label: Primary materials
fields.drafting_instructions: List the primary manufacturing materials accurately.

fields.label: Retail price
fields.drafting_instructions: State the verified retail price and currency, or the applicable official status.

fields.label: Physical dimensions
fields.drafting_instructions: State dimensions with units and order clearly labeled.
